center.name: 比较动物学博物馆
center.summary: 比较动物学博物馆是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑嘴天鹅，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Historically, the range of trumpeter swans extended as far south as Texas and southern California. Since 1992, trumpeter swans have also been found in Arkansas each November–February on Magness Lake, outside of Heber Springs. In addition, the collection of the Museum of Comparative Zoology in Cambridge, Massachusetts, includes a specimen that was shot by F
